testcase.name: T-UI-11 - Verify that Valid admin login redirects to the dashboard
T-UI-12 - Verify that Empty username shows a validation message
T-UI-13 - Verify that Empty password shows a validation message
T-UI-14 - Verify that Invalid credentials show a global error message
T-UI-15 - Verify that Admin logout shows a success message and ends the session
T-UI-16 - Verify that Valid user login redirects to the dashboard
T-UI-17 - Verify that Dashboard displays summary information
T-UI-18 - Verify that Navigation menu highlights the active page
T-UI-19 - Verify that Unauthenticated access is redirected to login
T-UI-20 - Verify that Normal user is blocked from an admin-only page
